codeSystems.name: CDHIv1
codeSystems.title: Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1
codeSystems.description: Value Set for Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1. Autogenerated from DAK artifacts

codeSystems.name: CDHIv1.1
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Clients
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Clients (persons using health services). Group 1 of the Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1 (2018).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv1.2
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Health Workers
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Health Workers. Group 2 of the Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1 (2018).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv1.3
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Health System Managers
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Health System Managers. Group 3 of the Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1 (2018).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv1.4
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions: Data Services
codeSystems.description: Crosscutting Data Services DHIs. Group 4 of the Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1 (2018).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv2
codeSystems.title: Classification of Digital Health Interventions v2
codeSystems.description: Value Set for the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health (CDISAH), second edition (2023).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv2.1
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Persons
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Persons (health service users). Group 1 of the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv2.2
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Healthcare Providers
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Healthcare Providers. Group 2 of the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv2.3
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions for Health Management and Support Personnel
codeSystems.description: Digital Health Interventions whose primary user group is Health Management and Support Personnel. Group 3 of the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDHIv2.4
codeSystems.title: Digital Health Interventions: Data Services
codeSystems.description: Crosscutting Data Services DHIs. Group 4 of the Classification of Digital Interventions, Services and Applications in Health v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv1
codeSystems.title: Health System Challenges
codeSystems.description: Value set for Health System Challenges (Classification of Digital Health System Categories v1, 2018). Includes all 25 system category codes (A–Y).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types
codeSystems.description: Value set for Services and Application Types (Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2, CDISAH 2023). Includes all codes across the five architecture groups (A–E).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2.A
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types: Point of Service
codeSystems.description: Systems that facilitate the provision and delivery of healthcare services to persons at the point of care. Group A of the Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2.B
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types: Health System/Provider Administration
codeSystems.description: Systems that support the administrative and managerial functions of health systems and healthcare organisations. Group B of the Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2.C
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types: Registries and Directories
codeSystems.description: Systems that create, maintain, and provide authoritative master records for persons, providers, facilities, products and health events. Group C of the Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2.D
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types: Data Management Services
codeSystems.description: Services and systems that support the collection, aggregation, storage, analysis, and exchange of health data. Group D of the Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CDSCv2.E
codeSystems.title: Services and Application Types: Surveillance and Response
codeSystems.description: Systems that support the detection, monitoring, and response to disease outbreaks and public health threats. Group E of the Classification of Digital Health Services and Application Types v2 (CDISAH, 2023).

codeSystems.name: CoreDataElementTypeVS
codeSystems.title: Core Data Element Type Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set of core data element types

codeSystems.name: DecisionTableActions
codeSystems.title: Smart Guidelines Decision Table Actions
codeSystems.description: Value Set for Smart Guidelines Documentation Decision Table Actions

codeSystems.name: DocumentationSection
codeSystems.title: Smart Guidelines Documentation Section
codeSystems.description: Value Set for Smart Guidelines Documentation Section to autogenerate documentation from artifacts

codeSystems.name: ISCO08ValueSet
codeSystems.title: ISCO-08 Value Set
codeSystems.description: Extensible value set of ISCO-08 codes for persona classification

codeSystems.name: SGPersonaTypesVS
codeSystems.title: Smart Guidelines Persona Types Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value Set for Smart Guidelines Persona Section to autogenerate documentation from artifacts
